title: Password Reset
content: To reset your password: 1) Click 'Forgot Password' on login page. 2) Enter your email. 3) Check email for reset link. 4) Click link and create new password. Password must be 8+ characters.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Setup
content: Enable 2FA in Security Settings for better protection. Supported methods: SMS, authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy). Setup takes 2 minutes. You'll be asked for 2FA code on login.

title: Account Login Issues
content: If you can't login: 1) Reset your password. 2) Check email is correct. 3) Clear browser cache. 4) Try incognito mode. 5) Contact support if still stuck.

title: Account Recovery
content: If your account is compromised: 1) Change password immediately. 2) Review recent activity in Security tab. 3) Revoke suspicious sessions. 4) Enable 2FA. 5) Contact support if needed.
